Frequently Asked Questions

Polypropylene mesh for hernia repair and tissue reinforcement

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the FILAPROP MESH POLYPROPYLENE MESH, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The FILAPROP MESH POLYPROPYLENE MESH is constructed using Polypropylene (PP), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
